case_title: SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY VS. CARDELL COLEMAN JR.

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY SERVED JUN-27-2015, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN JR., CARDELL
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-14-2025.

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COLEMAN JR., CARDELL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 25 NICHOLS WAY, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94124 COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS NO SASE; CONFORMED COPY IN DEPT. 501'S OUTBOX.(SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN JR., CARDELL SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN JR., CARDELL
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON JUL-21-2025.
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COLEMAN JR., CARDELL
